use_cases: Multi-section website footer with About, Education, Services, and Resources navigation
Footer with scroll-triggered staggered entrance animations using Framer Motion
Website footer with animated social media link icons
Sticky footer design with organized link sections for corporate websites
Responsive footer component for SaaS and general-purpose web applications
ai_summary: A multi-section footer component featuring four navigation columns (About, Education, Services, Resources) with social media links. The component implements Framer Motion animations with staggered entrance effects triggered on scroll, including fade-in, slide-up, and scale animations. Designed as a sticky footer with a clean, minimalist visual style suitable for SaaS and corporate websites.
